summary: Iteration 39: Phase 5C Split Shared-SKU Pools testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. DOA products now have individual SKU sets (Amphetamine=28, Cocaine=14, Multi Drug=243). MBOSS screws promoted to high confidence and appear in Compatible Components for AURIC plate and PFRN nail. Related Products section displays correctly with green 'Compatible Screw' badges and amber 'Coated Variant' badges.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5C split shared-SKU pools successfully. DOA products: Amphetamine=28 SKUs, Cocaine=14 SKUs, Multi Drug=243 SKUs. MBOSS screws promoted to high confidence. Key test slugs: meriscreen-drug-of-abuse-(doa)-rapid-test---amphetamine-1000ng-ml (28 SKUs, all DARAMP-* codes), 2.4mm-lps-distal-radial-volar-buttress-plate (AURIC plate, shows 5 MBOSS screws in Compatible Components), clavo-pfrn-proximal-femoral-rotational-stability-nail (PFRN nail, shows 5 MBOSS screws). Admin password: kOpcELYcEvkVtyDAE5-2uw
